summary: Registers a click-driven benchmark run that prevents the default action, runs an asynchronous measurement, and displays tabular statistics plus per-sample export text.
signature_intent: Takes a clickable control, an output container, a benchmark label, and an asynchronous measurement callback.
behavior: Adds a click listener without capturing.
Cancels the clicked control's default action.
Disables all buttons on the page while the measurement is running.
Clears the output container before starting the measurement.
Allows the cleared state to render before invoking the measurement callback.
Re-enables all page buttons after a successful measurement.
Displays sample count, total, mean, and standard deviation using the reported unit.
Rounds total, mean, and standard deviation to two decimal places.
Displays one export row per measured sample, including environment label, mapping count, benchmark label, and sample value.
edge_cases: If the measurement callback rejects or throws, buttons remain disabled and no result table is rendered.
If expected statistic methods or fields are missing, rendering fails after the measurement completes.
If external labels or mapping metadata are unavailable, export generation fails.
Existing output content is discarded on every click.
forbidden_details: Original identifier names are intentionally omitted.
Repository and source-location details are intentionally omitted.
Low-level construction details are intentionally omitted.
